channel.title: TJ Helm — Blog
channel.description: Technical writing on systems, tools, and things built.

item.title: Better ECS Systems for Emergent Design
item.description: An introduction to my C++ simulation engine design for emergent NPC behaviour and physical material based gameplay.
item.author: Thomas Helm

item.title: Introduction
item.description: The first post on this blog; a quick note on what to expect here.
item.author: Thomas Helm
